title: (flake) RHEL 9.6.0 system tests: local rootless: `not ok 390 |505| UDP/IPv4 large transfer, loopback`
body:
### Issue Description

```
not ok 390 |505| UDP/IPv4 large transfer, loopback in 3145ms
# tags: ci:parallel
# (from function `bail-now' in file test/system/helpers.bash, line 197,
#  from function `assert' in file test/system/helpers.bash, line 1096,
#  from function `pasta_test_do' in file test/system/505-networking-pasta.bats, line 263,
#  in test file test/system/505-networking-pasta.bats, line 754)
#   `pasta_test_do' failed
#
# [20:44:09.391983213] $ /var/ARTIFACTS/work-rootless-local4m9sfh5a/plans/system/rootless-local/tree/bin/podman info --format {{.Host.Pasta.Executable}}
# [20:44:10.758428104] /usr/bin/pasta
# 1+0 records in
# 1+0 records out
# 53248 bytes (53 kB, 52 KiB) copied, 0.000287534 s, 185 MB/s
#
# [20:44:10.868742408] $ /var/ARTIFACTS/work-rootless-local4m9sfh5a/plans/system/rootless-local/tree/bin/podman run -i --rm quay.io/libpod/testimage:20241011 /home/podman/bytecheck
# [20:44:11.306850089] size=53248 hash=e8ac1c0b487e50ac6fa9122bbc191249 - head= c9 01 4f f8 97 75 28 ae tail= f3 b1 e5 10 4b 4d 3b 3e
#
# [20:44:11.331246951] $ /var/ARTIFACTS/work-rootless-local4m9sfh5a/plans/system/rootless-local/tree/bin/podman run -d --name=c-socat-t390-casgfqdm --net=pasta -p [127.0.0.1]:5263:5263/udp quay.io/libpod/testimage:20241011 sh -c for port in $(seq 5263 5263); do                              socat -u UDP4-LISTEN:${port},null-eof EXEC:/home/podman/bytecheck &                          done; wait
# [20:44:11.538427395] ce4654f5c63266fd5395ab2d217fb82ed0527f72f2c3866d9def910d0d900cf0
#
# [20:44:11.551490624] $ /var/ARTIFACTS/work-rootless-local4m9sfh5a/plans/system/rootless-local/tree/bin/podman exec c-socat-t390-casgfqdm ss -Hln -4 --udp sport = 5263
# [20:44:11.893058032] UNCONN 0      0      0.0.0.0:5263 0.0.0.0:*
#
# [20:44:11.915886213] $ /var/ARTIFACTS/work-rootless-local4m9sfh5a/plans/system/rootless-local/tree/bin/podman logs --follow c-socat-t390-casgfqdm
# [20:44:12.182744940] size=36864 hash=962c14eb8673c2ce80ac375e607fa382 - head= c9 01 4f f8 97 75 28 ae tail= f3 b1 e5 10 4b 4d 3b 3e
# #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
# #|     FAIL: Mismatch between data sent and received
# #| expected: = size=53248 hash=e8ac1c0b487e50ac6fa9122bbc191249 - head= c9 01 4f f8 97 75 28 ae tail= f3 b1 e5 10 4b 4d 3b 3e
# #|   actual:   size=36864 hash=962c14eb8673c2ce80ac375e607fa382 - head= c9 01 4f f8 97 75 28 ae tail= f3 b1 e5 10 4b 4d 3b 3e
# #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
```
